description.value: This spell weakens the bonds of existence, and reduces the hardness of any non-magical surface within its area of effect by 2 per caster level. The spell is centered on a flat surface chosen by the caster, and the hardness reduction effect persists for the duration of the spell. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Inner Sea Gods Â© 2014, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Authors: Sean K Reynolds, with Amanda Hamon, James Jacobs, John Ling, Mark Moreland, David N.
